sections.description:
Full SEO remediation bridge: title/meta, snippet injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, and cache purge. RankMath is optional — the bridge handles all SEO meta output natively when RankMath is inactive.

All snippets stored in wp_options and output via wp_head/wp_footer. Fully API-driven.
sections.installation:
1. Upload the plugin zip via Plugins → Add New → Upload.
  2. Activate the plugin.
  3. Create an Application Password for an Administrator user (Users → Profile → Application Passwords).
  4. Use the REST endpoints at /wp-json/rankmath-bridge/v1/ with HTTP Basic Auth.
sections.changelog:
2.0.0 — April 2026

  • Native SEO meta output (title, description, robots, og:) when RankMath is inactive
  • Image ALT text endpoints: list, single set, bulk-alt
  • Dynamic llms.txt generator at /llms.txt with REST config endpoint
  • Dynamic XML sitemap at /rmb-sitemap.xml, respects noindex postmeta
  • Sitemap preview endpoint (/sitemap/preview) returns included/excluded entries
  • Bulk meta read/write endpoints (/meta/bulk-get, /meta/bulk-update)
  • Status endpoint now reports rankmath_active, sitemap_url, llms_url

1.2.2

  • Fix: register replace-all route before wildcard id route to prevent 404 collision

1.2.1

  • Added /snippets/replace-all endpoint for atomic full-store rewrite

1.2.0 — April 2026

  • Removed HFCM dependency entirely
  • Snippet store via wp_options
  • Cache purge (LiteSpeed, SiteGround, WP Rocket, W3TC)
  • WordPress auto-update via GitHub

1.0.0

  • Initial release
